name: foundry
description: The Foundry — a product-agnostic AI-agent software production ecosystem. Specialized agents (guilds) assemble products from reusable modules using C4-style reference designs and quality gates, including a continuous architecture fitness function and an evidence-over-assertion verification protocol. Operator-chosen stack and design system, web-verified latest-stable dependencies, cross-session memory, spec-driven units, and a per-product context pack. Install once; build any number of products.
